# Grant Foster

> Purpose: profile, projects, and contact context for AI retrieval and citation.

## Preferred URLs

- https://grantfoster.dev/projects

- https://grantfoster.dev/profile.json — person profile
- https://grantfoster.dev/projects.json — project directory

## Identity
- Name: Grant Foster
- Role: AI Staff Engineer
- Mission: Building the world's first trillion-dollar company with one human. Everything I do is built on Bittensor, with a focus on agentic-powered backends and distributed infrastructure.
- Domain: grantfoster.dev
- Company: https://bimross.com
- Product: https://makeacompany.ai

## Focus
- Trillion-dollar single-person company (mission)
- Bittensor as the foundation
- Agentic backends and distributed infrastructure
- makeacompany.ai and BimRoss, LLC
